author: Kathryn Lundstrom
title: Walmart Targets Small Businesses With Streaming Ad Marketplace
description: With the launch of a new marketplace called Connect Select, the retail giant is making connected TV ad inventory available through Walmart DSP alongside search and display.

author: Michael Bürgi
title: Walmart’s expanded data offering to agencies and advertisers gets closer to self-serve
description: Although Scintilla has been up and running since 2021, it’s making more of its commerce-side data available to agencies and tech partners, and it’s also giving them more direct access to it.

title: Advertisers are flying blind on ChatGPT ads — Adthena wants to change that
description: Adthena has launched ChatGPT AdBridge -- a tool which aims to turn clients' existing Google Ads accounts into ready-to-run ChatGPT campaigns.
